visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a black-and-white polo shirt and white overalls stands with two young boys in front of a 7-Eleven store in Tokyo. The boys wear matching black-and-white striped shirts. Large yellow and white text overlays the screen. The setting is an outdoor street area in bright daylight with the glass storefront reflecting the surroundings. (2) The scene shifts indoors to a close-up of a reach-in freezer. A hand reaches in and selects a blue-lidded plastic cup specifically labeled for iced milk tea. The freezer is packed with various other pre-packaged ice cups. The lighting is bright and industrial. (3) The camera follows a hand carrying the cup and a receipt to a payment counter, then moves to a black specialized tea machine. The cup is placed into the designated slot under a dispenser. The machine features a touchscreen and labels like 'CAFE LATTE' and '紅茶専用'. (4) A close-up shows a finger pressing a large orange 'PUSH' button on the machine's digital interface. The screen then displays a stylized animation of a teapot steeping with progress text. The lighting from the screen is clear and sharp. (5) Liquid tea and milk are shown pouring into the transparent plastic cup, creating a layered effect with the ice. The machine's housing is silver and black metal. The camera uses a close-up shot to focus on the drink formation. (6) The woman appears again, holding the finished drink and smiling at the camera. She stands in the store aisle next to the machine. A hand then pours a small container of clear syrup into the foamy drink. (7) A final shot shows the woman holding the completed iced milk tea with a straw toward the camera. The cup features the 'SEVEN & i' and 'SEVEN CAFE' logos. The background consists of blurred store shelves.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 日本東京僅7間 現泡紅茶機. [Slogan]: レジで注文する 紅茶新登場!. [Logo]: 7-Eleven. (2) [Slogan]: 冰箱取水婉杯 *也有熱的. (3) [Slogan]: 有L、M可選 *熱的櫃檯買. (4) [Slogan]: 先結帳 *大冰紅茶牛奶約台幣60. (5) [Slogan]: 紅茶專用機 *也有純紅茶的選項. (6) [Slogan]: 放入指定位置. (7) [Slogan]: 按下開始. (8) [Slogan]: 飲料製作中. (9) [Slogan]: 大約90秒. (10) [Slogan]: 完成 *本身無糖. (11) [Slogan]: 甜度自由調配 *旁邊有糖漿. (12) [Slogan]: 想念台灣鮮奶茶時 可以買一杯來喝.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female main character, 2 young boys appearing in the intro and background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair tied back, wearing a black-and-white striped polo and white baggy overalls.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts outside a Tokyo 7-Eleven storefront and moves inside to the freezer section, checkout counter, and self-service beverage machine area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and bouncy synthesized pop music starts immediately. The tempo is fast and energetic. Subtle outdoor street noise is audible in the background floor. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the scene cuts. The music continues with a strong electronic beat. The sound of a freezer door opening is faintly heard. (3) A digital 'chime' SFX rings out followed by another quick transition 'whoosh'. Mechanical sounds of handling a plastic cup and a receipt are present. (4) A mechanical 'click' and a digital interface 'beep' occur as a button is pressed. This is immediately followed by a low humming and gurgling sound of a liquid dispenser machine operating. (5) A pouring and splashing liquid sound effect is prominent for several seconds, layered over the continuous BGM. A 'ding' chime signals the completion of the beverage. (6) A playful 'pop' SFX is timed with a visual pose. The music loops. The sound of plastic lid manipulation and a liquid pour (syrup) is audible. (7) The music continues to the end with final 'whoosh' and 'pop' transition effects for the closing screen.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Process -> Result -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a new self-service freshly brewed milk tea machine available at select 7-Eleven locations in Tokyo, Japan. The video provides a step-by-step tutorial on how to purchase and prepare the drink.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on a specific product and service offered by 7-Eleven, showing logos and purchase instructions.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Fast-paced social media edit style designed for travel/food influencers. High information density with clear visual cues.
